script: echo === current aixa-bot unit ExecStart ===; systemctl show aixa-bot.service -p ExecStart --value; echo; echo === aixa-bot process state ===; systemctl show aixa-bot.service -p ActiveState -p SubState -p MainPID -p Result --value; echo; echo === recent journal ===; sudo journalctl -u aixa-bot.service -n 10 --no-pager 2>&1 | tail -10; echo; echo === where do aixa files actually live ===; sudo find / -maxdepth 5 -name 'aixa*.py' 2>/dev/null
